target_hardware.strategy: Image-to-image pixel-art stylization without Stable Diffusion or FLUX. Pure-PyTorch CycleGAN/pix2pix ResNet generator (no custom CUDA ops) so it runs on Blackwell / sm_120 with the existing cu128 PyTorch. Size-preserving: feed a low-res image to get genuine low-res output. Downscaling and palette limiting are out of scope and handled downstream.
